title: Amtech S8006 3 LED telescopic torch and magnetic pick up tool
features: VERSATILE: This telescopic torch and magnetic pick up tool has 3 super bright LEDs and can also be used to pick up screws and hard to reach metal objects
DURABLE AND EASY TO USE: It has a sturdy aluminium body with a knurled handle for extra grip
LONG REACH: Extending to 560mm (22"), it bends and rotates 360 degrees for confined areas
